'''gasaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leade|leade]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leade|leade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gasaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæsæjæth|gæsæjæth]] || [[word:gæsæjæj|gæsæjæj]] || [[word:gæsæjæsh|gæsæjæsh]] || [[word:gæsæjæ|gæsæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasasajath|gasasajath]] || [[word:gasasajaj|gasasajaj]] || [[word:gasasajash|gasasajash]] || [[word:gasasaja|gasasaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasajath|gasajath]] || [[word:gasajaj|gasajaj]] || [[word:gasajash|gasajash]] || [[word:gasaja|gasaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasafjath|gasafjath]] || [[word:gasafjaj|gasafjaj]] || [[word:gasafjash|gasafjash]] || [[word:gasafjaf|gasafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gasajatha|gasajatha]] || [[word:gasajaja|gasajaja]] || [[word:gasajasha|gasajasha]] || [[word:gasajaka|gasajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gasajath|gasajath]] || [[word:gasajaj|gasajaj]] || [[word:gasajash|gasajash]] || [[word:gasaja|gasaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gasajathal|gasajathal]] || [[word:gasajajal|gasajajal]] || [[word:gasajashal|gasajashal]] || [[word:gasajakal|gasajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gasajathatha|gasajathatha]] || [[word:gasajajaja|gasajajaja]] || [[word:gasajashasha|gasajashasha]] || [[word:gasajaka|gasajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gasajathan|gasajathan]] || [[word:gasajajan|gasajajan]] || [[word:gasajashan|gasajashan]] || [[word:gasajakan|gasajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gasajathaoro|gasajathaoro]] || [[word:gasajajaoro|gasajajaoro]] || [[word:gasajashaoro|gasajashaoro]] || [[word:gasajakaoro|gasajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
